content.content: Delete the existing ssh key from my github account.

(function_thought)
To delete the existing SSH key from your GitHub account, I will first retrieve the linked SSH keys associated with your account. This information will allow me to identify the SSH key(s) available for deletion. After obtaining the keys, I can proceed to delete the desired one.

I'll begin by calling the `git_get_linked_ssh_keys` function to retrieve the SSH keys.
</function_thought>

(function_call)
[git_get_linked_ssh_keys()]
</function_call>
